qa_pair.question: Using the SoloWay tools, resolve the city "Львів" (Lviv, Ukraine) and report its internal numeric city_id.
Using the SoloWay tools, resolve the city "Київ" (Kyiv, the capital) and report its internal numeric city_id (the city itself, not a raion/district).
Call get_calendar_prices for the Kyiv→Lviv route for any month. What ISO 4217 currency code does the response report?

Call search_trips with from="Kyiv" and to="Lviv" using the default locale and no explicit city ids. Does the from-city resolve to a single city, or does the tool return a disambiguation list of candidate cities? Answer exactly "resolved" or "disambiguation".

Call search_trips for from_city_id=6450, to_city_id=6164 for a near-future weekday. Are there any direct intercity bus trips on that route (i.e. at least one trip with transfers = 0)? Answer "yes" or "no".
Call get_trip_details for any Kyiv→Lviv trip. In the returned stops list, what is the stop_type value of the very first stop? Answer the exact enum string.

Call search_trips for from_city_id=6450, to_city_id=6164 for a date that is clearly in the past (e.g. 2020-01-01). Does the tool return an error, or an empty trip list with a note that the date is in the past? Answer "error" or "empty".
Look at the booking link returned by search_trips for any route. What is the value of the utm_medium query parameter in that URL?
